programs.title: Xploration DIY Sci S5 - "The Higgins Show"
programs.desc: After years of feeling like he’s been the butt of all of Steve Spangler’s jokes, his sidekick Higginsworth threatens to leave unless Steve quits his pranks.

programs.title: Xploration DIY Sci S5 - "Science Fair"
programs.desc: Steve Spangler’s sidekick Higginsworth panics when he has to deliver a science fair project.

programs.title: Xploration DIY Sci S5 - "Museum Of Science, Boston #2"
programs.desc: Host Steve Spangler and his sidekick Higginsworth return to the Museum of Science, Boston, where they take simple demonstrations they’ve done on DIY Sci and make them gigantic!

programs.title: Xploration DIY Sci S5 - "Inclusion"
programs.desc: For first time in his career as an educator, host Steve Spangler is invited to teach a class of kids who are blind or visually impaired.

programs.title: Oddly Satisfying Science S1 - "The Sound of Science"
programs.desc: This week's experiments hit high notes as we discover the physics of theremins, investigate how the outer ear impacts human hearing, and put on a laser show with cymatics.

programs.title: Around the World in 80 Tricks S1 - "Mumbai"
programs.desc: Pete Heat in Manchester and visits Old Trafford and for his finale; he wows a group of friends with his unique and comedic magic skills.
